---
title: "progress-report-EwanFarnum.Rmd"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-30"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

```{r}
library(rvest)
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)

url <- "https://www.baseball-reference.com/awards/hof_2026.shtml"

page <- read_html(url)
tables <- page %>% html_table(fill = TRUE)

hof <- tables[[1]]

names(hof) <- as.character(hof[1, ])
hof <- hof[-1, ] 


```

```{r}
hof_2026 <- hof %>%
 select(Name, Votes, `%vote`, Yrs) %>%
  mutate(
    YearID = 2026,
    Name = gsub("^X", "", Name),
     Name = gsub("-", "", Name),
     Name = str_remove(Name, "-"),
    Votes = as.numeric(Votes),
    percent_vote = readr::parse_number(`%vote`),
    Yrs = as.numeric(Yrs),
    Inducted = ifelse(percent_vote >= 75, "Y", "N")
  )
```
```{r}
hof_2026 <- hof_2026 %>%
  select(Name, YearID, Yrs, Votes, percent_vote, Inducted)
```
```{r}
write.csv(hof_2026, file="HallofFame_2026.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
